metadata.description: Agent skills for Claude Code covering writing, research, client work, and web design — built by Make Good.

plugins.name: article-pipeline
plugins.description: Complete pipeline for researching, designing, drafting, and repurposing long-form articles. Includes series design, article drafting, video scripting, writing standards, and voice extraction.

plugins.name: web-design
plugins.description: Interactive website content strategy and Divi 5 design token pipeline. Covers website content architecture and Divi 5-compatible variable import generation.

plugins.name: writing-case-studies
plugins.description: Guides creation of comprehensive case studies from interview transcripts, notes, or outlines. Produces the case study plus supporting assets.

plugins.name: writing-project-dossiers
plugins.description: Creates comprehensive project dossiers through interactive guided conversation. Produces scope documents covering objectives, deliverables, timeline, budget, and team roles.

plugins.name: creating-organization-dossiers
plugins.description: Creates structured organizational dossiers following a 6-phase research workflow. Produces comprehensive profiles with executive summary, leadership, financials, and strategic analysis.

plugins.name: planning-social-campaigns
plugins.description: Plans social media campaigns from source content, producing a campaign strategy, asset calendar, per-asset content files, and optional engagement plan.

plugins.name: synthesizing-interviews
plugins.description: Synthesizes interview transcripts into comprehensive research documents with structured insights, key quotes, speaker information, and verified references.

plugins.name: researching-youtube-channels
plugins.description: Researches YouTube channels and retrieves video metadata, descriptions, and transcripts. Search a channel's library or find videos on specific topics.

plugins.name: processing-docx-edits
plugins.description: Processes DOCX files containing tracked changes and comments, synthesizes all edits, and produces clean final documents.

plugins.name: generating-meeting-reports
plugins.description: Generates structured meeting reports from transcripts. Extracts attendees, topics, decisions, action items, and resources into a standardized executive summary format.

plugins.name: building-context-libraries
plugins.description: Builds modular context libraries that change how AI agents behave with organizational knowledge. Transforms source documents into metaprompt modules.

plugins.name: creating-skills
plugins.description: Guides creation of new Agent Skills from prompts, context files, and requirements. Provides skill architecture knowledge, best practices, and testing procedures.

plugins.name: auditing-skills
plugins.description: Audits existing Agent Skills against current best practices. Reviews structure, behavioral guardrails, phase boundaries, and commitment gates.
